features: Our Air Wick Automatic Sprays now with 5X odour neutralisation power are infused with natural essential oils and designed for 24/7 odour neutralisation for up to 70 days on lowest setting.
Tackle 5 of the toughest and most common home odours with our variety of fragrances to use around your home. Air Freshener.
Enjoy automatic fragrance delivery with fragrance lasting up to 70 days* (*based on lowest setting)
Air Wick White Vanilla Bean Freshmatic Autospray refill 250ml Lasts for up to 70 days, Infused with Natural Essential Oils.
